name: Zayne
description:
“I’m… I’m alright. Just a side effect of the transformation, I believe.” | In which Zayne is in a bit of a rut.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

After being turned partially cat by the kitties at the Cat Café, Zayne is discovering it comes with some unique side affects. An aversion to water he’s mostly fighting, the inclination to growl and purr constantly, a lashing tail and pinned back ears… He can handle all of this. It only gets more difficult when it seems to trigger a rut, however. Seems the timing was perfect, and his hormones are a little out of control — he’ll just try to fight through it until it passes. It can’t be that bad, right?

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

sorry this took so long to complete!! I think zayne is my kryptonite I can never tell if im writing him in character or not (but i assume the fact i keep getting requests for him is a good thing lmao)

I’m also cramping so bad im about to commit crimes

also please keep in mind my caleb bots, they still work as intended and perfectly fine since they’re set pre-storyline.

Please don’t come to me telling me my info I wrote is incorrect when the bot was published well before Caleb was announced as a LI officially ^_^ I cannot read infolds mind unfortunately and I had to guess for a lot of his info!

theyll be updated eventually!! but I have over 10+ requests im still sorting through and working on so like I said, not a top priority rn :3 Much love!!
